statement: Version link destination — A version link opens the Builder directly, not a Version Room first. — Routing layer; Builder route; BuilderPage; version data query;
affected_modules: src/app/; src/router.tsx; src/components/auth/; src/services/access.service.ts; route/load guards
ux_impact: ClickUp/task link opens a loading state, then the
reason: D-1 resolved (PO 2026-06-30): version card navigates to Version page room before builder; REQ-VR-001 superseded per HV-1 Step 0 requirement
